hero.title: Discover the Healing Power of the Ocean
hero.subtitle: Immerse yourself in a tranquil space where the sound of waves and hydrotherapy rituals bring perfect balance to body, mind and spirit.

highlights.title: Signature Services
highlights.subtitle: Exclusive rituals drawn from the essence of the ocean.

items.title: Hydrotherapy
items.desc: Activates circulation and releases deep muscle tension with warm mineral water currents.

items.title: Ocean Meditation
items.desc: Meditate to the ambient sound of authentic ocean waves.

items.title: Body Revitalization
items.desc: Awaken every sense with a full-body ritual combining mineral mud and deep-sea algae.

services.title: Experience Catalogue
services.subtitle: Choose the package that suits your journey of renewal and revitalization.

items.name: Seaweed Mask
items.desc: Deep restoration and hydration for tired skin.

items.name: Mineral Salt Scrub
items.desc: Removes dead skin cells to reveal naturally radiant skin.

items.name: Ocean Oxygen Facial
items.desc: Deep oxygen infusion for firmer, visibly younger skin.

items.name: Onsen Mineral Bath
items.desc: Full-body relaxation in warm mineral waters.

items.name: Jet-Stream Pool
items.desc: Water-pressure massage to ease muscle soreness.

items.name: Salt Stone Sauna
items.desc: Detoxifies the body and boosts circulation.

items.name: Ocean Escape (Half-Day)
items.desc: Three combined rituals for total energy renewal.

items.name: Deep Blue Bliss (Full-Day)
items.desc: A full day of care for body, mind and spirit.

items.name: Couples Retreat
items.desc: A romantic relaxation experience for two.

atmosphere.title: Pure Ambience

items.title: Infinite Ocean Views
items.desc: Every treatment room faces the ocean, delivering a complete sense of mental release.

items.title: Minimalist Design
items.desc: Natural materials, white marble and pale wood create an atmosphere of absolute stillness.

items.title: Therapeutic Sound
items.desc: A blend of authentic wave sounds and low-frequency music guides the body into deep relaxation.
